project: Model Atlas — Content Registry and Validation
description: Establish the Phase 1 structured content baseline for one canonical grouped-query-attention docs page: Zod schemas, registry/message/asset loaders, sample module/tag/citation records, colocated page files, and a failing validation gate wired through make validate-data.

context.customerAsk: Phase 1: implement the minimum structured content baseline needed for one canonical docs page, including TypeScript/Zod schemas, registry loaders, one module record, one tag record, one citation record, colocated message loading, colocated asset loading, and validation.
context.problem: Without typed schemas, loaders, and validation, registry JSON, MDX frontmatter, messages, and assets can drift apart. Downstream docs rendering, search, and tag surfaces would lack a trustworthy structured source of truth.
context.solution: Add Zod-backed content libraries under src/lib/content, seed grouped-query-attention registry and page-local files, implement registry/message/asset loaders, and ship scripts/validate-registry.ts plus make validate-data so broken references fail before build.

acceptanceCriteria: Zod schemas cover base registry fields plus module, tag, citation, page frontmatter, PageMessages, and PageAssetConfig aligned with docs/data-model.md
Registry loader exposes typed byId, bySlug, and tag indexes and loads the three baseline records
Colocated message and asset loaders validate and resolve the grouped-query-attention page directory
Baseline registry JSON and page bundle exist for module.grouped-query-attention, tag.attention, and one citation
scripts/validate-registry.ts exits 0 on baseline and non-zero with clear errors on broken references
make validate-data runs the validation script
Quality gate: typecheck, lint, and tests pass for all changes in this work item

userStories.title: Registry base and kind-specific Zod schemas
userStories.description: As a maintainer, I need typed Zod schemas for shared registry fields and the module, tag, and citation kinds so invalid JSON is caught before loaders or validation run.
acceptanceCriteria: src/lib/content/schemas.ts exports Zod schemas and inferred types for BaseRecord, RegistryKind, RegistryStatus, ModuleRecord, TagRecord, and CitationRecord matching docs/data-model.md

Module schema enforces moduleType, optimizes, practicalBenefits, and related id arrays; tag schema enforces category and landingPage; citation schema enforces citationType, authors, title, url, and mla
Invalid sample payloads fail safeParse in a focused schema unit test
Typecheck passes
Tests pass

userStories.title: Page frontmatter, message, and asset Zod schemas
userStories.description: As a maintainer, I need schemas for MDX frontmatter and colocated page files so the canonical page structure cannot drift from the registry contract.
acceptanceCriteria: src/lib/content/schemas.ts exports Zod schemas for PageFrontmatter, PageMessages, and PageAssetConfig aligned with docs/data-model.md
Frontmatter schema requires kind, registryId, messageNamespace, assetNamespace, tags, status, and updatedAt for module pages
Message schema requires title and description and validates nested sections and optional assets alt/caption keys
Asset schema validates discriminated type unions (image, graph, chart, table, code-schema) with required keys per type
Invalid frontmatter or asset config fails safeParse in a focused unit test
Typecheck passes
Tests pass

userStories.title: Registry loader with typed lookup maps
userStories.description: As a developer building docs features, I want a single registry loader that returns typed records and indexes so I do not parse JSON ad hoc in components.
acceptanceCriteria: src/lib/content/registry.ts reads JSON from src/content/registry/modules, tags, and citations directories
Loader returns byId, bySlug, and tagsById maps with Zod-inferred record types
Phase 1 baseline records resolve by id: module.grouped-query-attention, tag.attention, and the sample citation
Duplicate id or slug across loaded records produces a structured error
Unit test proves all three baseline records load and are retrievable by id
Typecheck passes
Tests pass

userStories.title: Baseline module, tag, and citation registry records
userStories.description: As a content author, I need real registry JSON for grouped-query attention so the canonical page has authoritative metadata, tags, and citations.
acceptanceCriteria: src/content/registry/modules/grouped-query-attention.json exists with id module.grouped-query-attention, kind module, status published, attention-related fields, tags including attention, and citationIds pointing at the sample citation
src/content/registry/tags/attention.json exists with id tag.attention, kind tag, category, and search-friendly aliases
src/content/registry/citations contains a published citation record referenced by the module
All three files pass Zod schemas when parsed directly
Typecheck passes
Tests pass

userStories.title: Colocated message loader
userStories.description: As a developer, I want to load default-locale page messages from messages/<locale>.json next to a docs page so MDX components can resolve T keys without reading files manually.
acceptanceCriteria: src/lib/content/messages.ts loads and validates messages/<locale>.json against PageMessages for a given page directory and locale
Missing default locale file en produces a clear error
Loader resolves grouped-query-attention title, description, and at least one sections key referenced by the module template
Unit test loads baseline page messages successfully
Typecheck passes
Tests pass

userStories.title: Colocated asset loader
userStories.description: As a developer, I want to load and resolve assets.json next to a docs page so MDX and graph components receive concrete asset config by id.
acceptanceCriteria: src/lib/content/assets.ts loads and validates colocated assets.json against PageAssetConfig
Resolving asset id computeFlow returns typed config including type and graph renderer fields
Unknown asset id returns a clear error
Unit test loads baseline grouped-query-attention assets and resolves computeFlow
Typecheck passes
Tests pass

userStories.title: Canonical grouped-query-attention page content bundle
userStories.description: As a content maintainer, I need the canonical MDX page structure plus colocated messages and assets so validation and future rendering share one baseline page.
acceptanceCriteria: src/content/docs/modules/grouped-query-attention/page.mdx exists with frontmatter registryId module.grouped-query-attention, kind module, local message and asset namespaces, and tags resolving to tag.attention
page.mdx follows module template structure with T, Section, and registry-backed components and no raw user-visible prose outside approved wrappers
messages/en.json provides non-empty title, description, problemStatement, coreIdea, and section keys referenced in page.mdx
assets.json declares computeFlow and other referenced asset ids with altKey and captionKey paths present in messages/en.json
Message and asset loaders succeed for this directory without error
Typecheck passes
Tests pass

userStories.title: Registry validation script
userStories.description: As a CI maintainer, I want validate-registry.ts to fail when registry, page, message, or asset data is inconsistent so bad content never ships.
acceptanceCriteria: scripts/validate-registry.ts validates registry JSON, enforces unique id and slug, and resolves relatedIds, citationIds, and tag references for the Phase 1 baseline
Script validates grouped-query-attention frontmatter, default-locale messages, MDX message keys, and asset ids against assets.json
Script exits 1 with a readable error when a baseline record references a missing tag or citation
Script exits 0 on the committed baseline
Typecheck passes
Tests pass

userStories.title: Make validate-data target and validation tests
userStories.description: As a developer running local CI, I want make validate-data and automated tests so registry validation stays wired and regressions are caught quickly.
acceptanceCriteria: Root Makefile defines validate-data to run bun ./scripts/validate-registry.ts
make validate-data succeeds on a clean checkout after this work item
Test suite covers successful baseline validation and at least one negative path for schema or unresolved reference failure
Typecheck passes
Tests pass
